description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. Add a UnitTest job in the test stage that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs the before_script commands `pip install -r requirements.txt`, `python manage.py makemigrations`, and `python manage.py migrate`, then executes `coverage run --include='lab_*/*' manage.py test` followed by `coverage report -m`, and runs only on successful pipelines. Add a Deployment job in the deploy stage that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image, runs the before_script command `gem install dpl`, then runs `dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY` to deploy to a Heroku production environment with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
